---
name: Technical Debt
about: Track technical debt that needs resolution
title: "chore(scope): "
labels: tech-debt
assignees: ""
---

## Description

What is the technical debt and where is it located?

## Impact

How does this debt affect development velocity, reliability, or security?

## Classification

- P1 (Critical): Blocking deployments, causing incidents, security vulnerabilities
- P2 (High): Slowing development, increasing incident risk
- P3 (Medium): Violating standards, reducing code quality
- P4 (Low): Style issues, minor refactoring

## Proposed Fix

How should this be resolved?

## Remediation Estimate

Estimated engineering hours to fix.

## Related Issues

Links to related issues or PRs.
